revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:R to subpage]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R to subpage]]</includeonly>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to subpage |name=To a subpage |to=a subpage |info=In a page title, a [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] name appears after a [[slash (punctuation)|forward slash]] (/); for example, "Wikipedia:Technical move requests" redirects to [[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Technical requests]], which is a subpage of [[Wikipedia:Requested moves]]. Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. See this template's [[Template:R to subpage/doc|documentation]] for details. |all category=Redirects to subpages }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:R to subpage]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R to subpage]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:R to subpage]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R to subpage]]</includeonly>
#redirect[[:en:Template:R to subpage]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R to subpage]]</includeonly>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to subpage |name=To a subpage |to=a subpage |info=In a page title, a [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] name appears after a [[slash (punctuation)|forward slash]] (/); for example, "Wikipedia:Technical move requests" redirects to [[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Technical requests]], which is a subpage of [[Wikipedia:Requested moves]]. Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. See this template's [[Template:R to subpage/doc|documentation]] for details. |all category=Redirects to subpages }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to subpage |name=To a subpage |to=a subpage |info=In a page title, a [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] name appears after a [[slash (punctuation)|forward slash]] (/); for example, "Wikipedia:Technical move requests" redirects to [[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Technical requests]], which is a subpage of [[Wikipedia:Requested moves]]. Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. See this template's [[:en:Template:R to subpage/doc|documentation]] for details. |all category=Redirects to subpages }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to subpage |name=To a subpage |to=a subpage |info=In a page title, a [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] name appears after a [[slash (punctuation)|forward slash]] (/); for example, "Wikipedia:Technical move requests" redirects to [[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Technical requests]], which is a subpage of [[Wikipedia:Requested moves]]. Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. See this template's [[:en:Template:R to subpage/doc|documentation]] for details. |all category=Redirects to subpages }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to subpage |name=To a subpage |to=a subpage |info=In a page title, a [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] name appears after a [[slash (punctuation)|forward slash]] (/); for example, "Wikipedia:Technical move requests" redirects to [[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Technical requests]], which is a subpage of [[Wikipedia:Requested moves]]. Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. See this template's [[:en:Template:R to subpage/doc|documentation]] for details. |all category=Redirects to subpages }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. See this template's [[:en:Template:R to subpage/doc|documentation]] for details. |all category=Redirects to subpages }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to subpage |name=To a subpage |to=a subpage |info=In a page title, a [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] name appears after a [[slash (punctuation)|forward slash]] (/); for example, "Wikipedia:Technical move requests" redirects to [[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Technical requests]], which is a subpage of [[Wikipedia:Requested moves]]. Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. See this template's [[:en:Template:R to subpage/doc|documentation]] for details. |all category=Redirects to subpages }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to subpage |name=To a subpage |to=a subpage |info=In a page title, a [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] name appears after a [[slash (punctuation)|forward slash]] (/); for example, "Wikipedia:Technical move requests" redirects to [[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Technical requests]], which is a subpage of [[Wikipedia:Requested moves]]. Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. See this template's [[:en:Template:R to subpage/doc|documentation]] for details. |all category=Redirects to subpages }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to subpage |name=To a subpage |to=a subpage |info=In a page title, a [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] name appears after a [[slash (punctuation)|forward slash]] (/); for example, "Wikipedia:Technical move requests" redirects to [[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Technical requests]], which is a subpage of [[Wikipedia:Requested moves]]. Please note that not every page title with "/" in its title is a subpage. See this template's [[:en:Template:R to subpage/doc|documentation]] for details. |all category=Redirects to subpages }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
